extraction.one_line_summary: LOPEZ Miguel Angel won after ROGLIC Primoz and POGACAR Tadej neutralized each other, with URAN Rigoberto cracking unexpectedly at the crucial moment losing 1:20.
tactical_patterns: Bahrain destroyed peloton 5 miles from Madeleine summit, unexpectedly reducing breakaway's advantage before main climb started.
ROGLIC neutralized POGACAR's early acceleration with arm-flick gesture, revealing defensive team dynamic favoring yellow jersey conservation.
CARAPAS Richard attacked solo in mile 20, showing INEOS finally attempting aggressive racing after passive earlier stages.
URAN Rigoberto's motor tuned for steady grades, cracked on steep-kick-then-flat rhythm of Col de la Loze finish.

rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: extended GC lead from 40s to 57s by marking POGACAR rather than racing for stage win
rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: neutral: took polka dots jersey but settled for neutralizing ROGLIC rather than attacking decisively
rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel Angel: positive: first Tour stage win came by outclimbing two superior GC riders when they watched each other
rider_signals.URAN Rigoberto: negative: lost 1:20 and podium position, unable to handle irregular gradients with steep kicks versus steady tempo
rider_signals.CARAPAS Richard: positive: first aggressive INEOS move of race with 20km solo attack, showing form despite team struggles
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: positive: extended green jersey lead by 2 points over SAGAN at intermediate sprint despite team leadout disadvantage
